title: Create Mario Kart-style racing game with 10+ characters

requirements.text: Create a 3D kart racing game using Three.js with React Three Fiber featuring a track environment with proper collision detection and physics

quotes: i want to create a racing game like super mario cart

acceptanceCriteria: 3D racing track is rendered with Three.js
Karts have physics-based movement and handling
Track boundaries prevent karts from leaving the course
Camera follows the player's kart from behind

requirements.text: Implement at least 10 distinct playable characters, each with a unique kart design and visual appearance that players can select before racing

quotes: I want there to be at least 10 characters

acceptanceCriteria: Character selection screen displays all 10+ characters
Each character has a unique 3D kart model or color scheme
Selected character is used in the race
Character names and basic attributes are displayed

requirements.text: Implement Mario Kart-style racing mechanics including acceleration, braking, drifting/power sliding, and item-based power-ups that affect gameplay

quotes: make it just like the mechanics of mario bro

acceptanceCriteria: Karts accelerate and brake with keyboard controls
Drifting mechanic allows for tighter turns and speed boosts
Power-up items appear on the track that can be collected
Items can be used to gain advantages or hinder opponents
Lap counter tracks player progress through the race

requirements.text: Create a race state management system that tracks player position, lap count, race time, and handles race start/finish conditions

quotes: i want to create a racing game like super mario cart

acceptanceCriteria: Race countdown starts the game (3-2-1-GO)
Current lap and total laps are displayed
Race time is tracked and shown
Race ends when player completes all laps
Final results screen shows completion time

requirements.text: Store race completion records in the backend including character used, completion time, and track name to maintain leaderboards

quotes: i want to create a racing game like super mario cart

acceptanceCriteria: Race results are saved to backend storage
Leaderboard data can be retrieved and displayed
Records include player identity, character, time, and date

requirements.text: Design a vibrant, colorful racing game aesthetic with a playful cartoon style reminiscent of classic kart racers, using bright colors, smooth animations, and energetic UI elements throughout the entire application
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses bright, saturated colors throughout
UI elements have rounded corners and playful typography
Animations are smooth and energetic
Visual theme is consistent across all screens

constraints: Use Three.js with React Three Fiber for all 3D graphics
All game logic must run client-side in the frontend
Backend only stores persistent data like leaderboards

required: Colorful cartoon-style racing track background with checkered flags and banners (track-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
Character selection grid showing 10 unique kart racer portraits in vibrant cartoon style (character-portraits.dim_1200x800.png)
Power-up item icons including speed boost, shield, and projectile in bright colors (powerup-icons.dim_512x512.png)
Racing game logo with bold playful lettering and kart silhouette (game-logo.dim_800x400.png)
